abstract: The TypeScript/React-specific wrong defaults when using ast-grep: the tsx-vs-typescript language split that makes JSX rules silently match nothing, JSX and TypeScript node kinds, fragment matching with context/selector, JSX/TS codemods, and the @ast-grep/napi API. Complements the general-purpose ast-grep skill, which covers language-agnostic rule mechanics. Every node kind and behavior was verified against ast-grep 0.44.1.
